hero.evolution:
The evolution of your
business is here

about.title: Neuroflow — your team of AI employees
about.subtitle1: Our platform allows you to launch AI agents to automate their projects, communications, and management. They work 24/7, freeing you from routine.
about.subtitle2: Agents make calls and correspond with clients.

features.feature1_description: Agents that act in place of a human, make decisions independently, and learn during their work, performing tasks without your participation.
features.feature2_description: Coordinating agent systems where different roles, tasks, and prompts allow for the creation of more complex solution scenarios, simulating the work of entire departments.
features.feature3_description: Templates for connecting to your CRM and knowledge bases will help agents integrate into your company's business processes.
features.feature4_description: A visual editor and ready-made templates for creating and configuring AI agents. No programming skills or complex technical costs required — with the help of Agent Builder.

results.title:

results.tag2: Scalability from a single agent to a network

testimonials.tag: / Entrepreneurs and small businesses trust us
testimonials.author1_text: We focused not on one task, but on a whole cycle of tasks to implement filters for 60k+ typical questions, the second was a well-tuned script, then the assistant qualifies incoming calls and categorizes them. They take all the necessary initiatives. Thus, over the last 4-5 months, we have felt a decrease in the load on departments and an increase in customer loyalty. This includes investments in the business over the last year.
testimonials.author2_text: We automated not one task, but a whole cycle: a support agent filters 80% of typical questions, a second one tracks delivery statuses and informs clients, and a third prepares analytics on returns. They work as a single mechanism. The platform paid for itself in 3 months due to the reduced workload on departments and increased customer loyalty. The best investment in the business in the last year.
testimonials.author3_text: Integration with our CRM went smoothly. AI agents handle customer inquiries 24/7, which has significantly improved our service level. We are seeing an increase in sales and loyalty. This is the best investment in our business in the last year.

faq.q1: We have a non-standard business process or the necessary integrations are not available on the platform. Can I request turnkey automation from your team?
faq.a1: It is for such complex and tertiary cases that we have created the 'Expert' plan! We will identify your specifics, develop individual agents, and integrate with the necessary systems, even if they are not in the standard catalog.
faq.q2: How safe is it to entrust my business data to your system?
faq.a2: We offer an on-premise solution that allows you to deploy the platform on your servers, ensuring complete control over your data.
faq.q3: My team has no technical specialists. Can we easily understand the platform and manage automation?
faq.a3: Yes, our platform is designed with a focus on Low-code/No-code, which allows you to manage agents and processes through an intuitive visual interface without the need for programming.
